browser.automation: Chrome DevTools Protocol using Node built-ins

implemented_checks: keyboard skip focus without route-fragment mutation
canonical hash routes and legacy route-query aliases
gzip route-index, record and adjacency hydration over HTTP
bootstrap bytes, first useful render, cold/warm search, route hydration and JavaScript heap budgets

blockers.detail: The sandbox rejected the ephemeral 127.0.0.1 listener with EPERM. The required escalation was then refused because the usage reviewer still reported the Codex usage limit as exhausted.
Installation of pinned Playwright and axe packages was refused by the same usage reviewer. No indirect installation workaround was attempted.
blockers.retry: Install and lock @playwright/test and @axe-core/playwright when authorised, then add the independent axe pass.
